u=string.len local b=math.floor local v=string.sub local t=e local I=type local o=table.insert local W=string.char for e=518221-518220,#t,36025+-36024 do local Y=t[e]if c=r%(116698+-116442)o(V,W(e,j,c))r=-929497+929497 end elseif e=="\061"then o(V,W(b(r/(-741995-(-807531)))))if y>=I or v(Y,y+(-732210+732211),y+(113877+-113876))~="\061"then o(V,W(b((r%(-83271+148807))/(-429894+430150))))end break end y=y+(909276+-909275)end t[e]=j(V)end end end return(function(e,u,b,v,t,I,o,U,r,d,c,W,k,y,Y,A,g,x,V,M,S,D)y,S,V,W,x,k,c,Y,r,D,U,A,M,g,d=180481+-180481,function(e,j)local u=r(j)local b=function(b,v,t,I,o)return c(e,{b,v;t;I;o},j,u)end return b
